Description: "Updating emulator fallback coordinates to user's Büyükçekmece coordinates so that they can see real-time distance calculations from their actual location in the emulator"
Instruction: "Change the fallback latitude and longitude to the user's Büyükçekmece coordinates"
ReplacementContent:
"      position ??= Position(
        // Fallback mock coordinates (Büyükçekmece, İstanbul) if GPS service hangs or fails
        latitude: 41.0207,
        longitude: 28.585,"
TargetContent:
"      position ??= Position(
        // Fallback mock coordinates (Kadıköy, İstanbul) if GPS service hangs or fails
        latitude: 40.9901,
        longitude: 29.0234,"
